metadata.description: Batch 44 — additional Oxford 5000 words 1301-1400; source-aligned from attached PDF

words.definitionEn: the act of going past or death
words.definitionTh: การผ่าน / การเสียชีวิต
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “passing”.

words.definitionEn: showing strong enthusiasm or emotion
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “passionate”.

words.definitionEn: not active or not reacting to change
words.definitionTh: เฉื่อย / ไม่โต้ตอบ
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “passive”.

words.definitionEn: a secret word used to gain access
words.example: Use a strong password for the camera account.

words.definitionEn: a Christian religious leader
words.definitionTh: ศิษยาภิบาล
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “pastor”.

words.definitionEn: a small piece used to cover or repair an area
words.definitionTh: แผ่นปะ / แพตช์
words.example: Install the latest software patch.

words.definitionEn: a legal right protecting an invention
words.example: The design is protected by a patent.

words.definitionEn: a route or sequence leading to a result
words.example: Define the escalation pathway.

words.definitionEn: the ability to wait calmly
words.example: Calibration requires patience and accuracy.

words.definitionEn: to watch an area for safety; a group doing so
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “patrol”.

words.definitionEn: a person who supports an organization or artist
words.definitionTh: ผู้อุปถัมภ์
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “patron”.

words.definitionEn: to stop briefly; a short break
words.definitionTh: หยุดชั่วคราว
words.example: Pause the line before adjustment.

words.definitionEn: the highest point or level
words.example: The motor reached peak temperature.

words.definitionEn: a poor farm worker
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “peasant”.

words.definitionEn: strange or unusual
words.definitionTh: แปลกประหลาด
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “peculiar”.

words.definitionEn: a person of equal status or ability
words.definitionTh: เพื่อนร่วมระดับ
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “peer”.

words.definitionEn: a punishment for breaking a rule
words.example: The contract includes a delay penalty.

words.definitionEn: regular money paid after retirement
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “pension1”.

words.definitionEn: to notice or understand something
words.example: The sensor perceives changes in contrast.

words.definitionEn: the way something is understood
words.example: Lighting affects color perception.

words.definitionEn: in a lasting or final way
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “permanently”.

words.definitionEn: to continue despite difficulty
words.example: The alarm will persist until reset.

words.definitionEn: continuing firmly for a long time
words.definitionTh: ต่อเนื่องไม่ยอมแพ้
words.example: Investigate the persistent fault.

words.definitionEn: the people employed by an organization
words.example: Only authorized personnel may enter.

words.definitionEn: a formal written request
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “petition”.

words.definitionEn: a person who studies fundamental questions
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “philosopher”.

words.definitionEn: relating to the study of knowledge and existence
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “philosophical”.

words.definitionEn: a medical doctor
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “physician”.

words.definitionEn: a small solid dose of medicine
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “pill”.

words.definitionEn: a person who develops new methods; to be first
words.definitionTh: ผู้บุกเบิก / บุกเบิก
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “pioneer”.

words.definitionEn: a long pipe or sequence carrying material or work
words.example: The data pipeline processes every image.

words.definitionEn: a person who attacks or steals at sea
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “pirate”.

words.definitionEn: a large hole in the ground
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “pit”.

words.definitionEn: a feeling of sympathy for suffering
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “pity”.

words.definitionEn: the act of putting someone or something in a position
words.example: Camera placement affects coverage.

words.definitionEn: a serious urgent request or legal statement
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “plea”.

words.definitionEn: to make an emotional or legal request
words.definitionTh: ให้การ / วิงวอน
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “plead”.

words.definitionEn: a serious promise; to promise
words.definitionTh: ให้คำมั่น / คำมั่น
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “pledge”.

words.definitionEn: to connect to power or fill a hole; a connector
words.definitionTh: เสียบ / ปลั๊ก
words.example: Plug the cable into the network switch.

words.definitionEn: to fall or move downward suddenly
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “plunge”.

words.definitionEn: a long upright post
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “pole”.

words.definitionEn: a survey of people’s opinions
words.definitionTh: การสำรวจความคิดเห็น
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “poll”.

words.definitionEn: a small area of still water
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “pond”.

words.definitionEn: to appear or move suddenly
words.definitionTh: เด้ง / โผล่
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “pop”.

words.definitionEn: a collection of projects or investments
words.example: Review the project portfolio.

words.definitionEn: a part of a larger whole
words.example: Inspect each product portion.

words.definitionEn: to represent someone or something in art or words
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “portray”.

words.definitionEn: to arrange for something to happen later
words.definitionTh: เลื่อนออกไป
words.example: Postpone deployment until validation passes.

words.definitionEn: relating to the period after a war
words.definitionTh: หลังสงคราม
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “postwar”.

words.definitionEn: possibly or with future capability
words.definitionTh: อาจเป็นไปได้
words.example: The loose cable is potentially dangerous.

words.definitionEn: a person actively working in a profession
words.definitionTh: ผู้ประกอบวิชาชีพ
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “practitioner”.

words.definitionEn: to give a religious or moral speech
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “preach”.

words.definitionEn: to happen or come before
words.example: Calibration must precede the trial.

words.definitionEn: an earlier event used as an example
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “precedent”.

words.definitionEn: very valuable or important
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “precious”.

words.definitionEn: exact and accurate
words.example: Use a precise measurement method.

words.definitionEn: in an exact way
words.definitionTh: อย่างแม่นยำ
words.example: Position the camera precisely.

words.definitionEn: the quality of being exact
words.definitionTh: ความเที่ยงตรง
words.example: The application requires high precision.

words.definitionEn: an animal that hunts others
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “predator”.

words.definitionEn: a person who held a position before another
words.definitionTh: ผู้ดำรงตำแหน่งก่อน
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “predecessor”.

words.definitionEn: able to be expected
words.definitionTh: คาดการณ์ได้
words.example: Stable lighting gives predictable results.

words.definitionEn: mainly or for the most part
words.definitionTh: โดยส่วนใหญ่
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “predominantly”.

words.definitionEn: a greater liking for one option
words.example: Record the operator’s interface preference.

words.definitionEn: the state of carrying a developing baby
words.definitionTh: การตั้งครรภ์
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “pregnancy”.

words.definitionEn: an unfair opinion formed in advance
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “prejudice”.

words.definitionEn: coming before the main event
words.example: Complete a preliminary risk assessment.

words.definitionEn: a leading official or first performance
words.definitionTh: นายกรัฐมนตรี / ผู้นำ
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “premier”.

words.definitionEn: a statement accepted as a basis for reasoning
words.definitionTh: หลักฐานตั้งต้น
words.example: Validate the premise with raw data.

words.definitionEn: an extra payment for higher quality
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “premium”.

words.definitionEn: to officially order medical treatment
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “prescribe”.

words.definitionEn: a written medical instruction
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “prescription”.

words.definitionEn: at the current time
words.definitionTh: ในปัจจุบัน
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “presently”.

words.definitionEn: the act of protecting something from loss
words.definitionTh: การสงวนรักษา
words.example: Data preservation supports traceability.

words.definitionEn: to lead a formal meeting
words.definitionTh: เป็นประธาน
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “preside”.

words.definitionEn: the office or period of a president
words.definitionTh: ตำแหน่งประธานาธิบดี
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “presidency”.

words.definitionEn: relating to a president
words.definitionTh: เกี่ยวกับประธานาธิบดี
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “presidential”.

words.definitionEn: respected and admired for high quality
words.definitionTh: มีชื่อเสียงสูง
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “prestigious”.

words.definitionEn: probably, based on reasonable belief
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “presumably”.

words.definitionEn: to suppose something is true
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “presume”.

words.definitionEn: to be widespread or succeed
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “prevail”.

words.definitionEn: the state of being common
words.definitionTh: ความแพร่หลาย
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “prevalence”.

words.definitionEn: action taken to stop harm or failure
words.definitionTh: การป้องกัน
words.example: The project focuses on defect prevention.

words.definitionEn: an animal hunted by another
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “prey”.

words.definitionEn: satisfaction from achievement or identity
words.definitionTh: ความภูมิใจ
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “pride”.

words.definitionEn: mainly
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “primarily”.

words.definitionEn: most important or having highest rank
words.definitionTh: หลัก / สำคัญ
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “principal”.

words.definitionEn: existing or happening earlier
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “prior”.

words.definitionEn: transfer of ownership from public to private control
words.definitionTh: การแปรรูปเป็นเอกชน
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “privatization”.

words.definitionEn: a special right or advantage
words.definitionTh: สิทธิพิเศษ
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “privilege”.

words.definitionEn: the chance that something will happen
words.definitionTh: ความน่าจะเป็น
words.example: Estimate the probability of failure.

words.definitionEn: likely to be true or happen
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “probable”.

words.definitionEn: a detailed investigation; to investigate
words.definitionTh: ตรวจสอบเชิงลึก
words.example: Use the probe to measure temperature.

words.definitionEn: causing difficulty or disagreement
words.example: Reflections remain problematic.

words.definitionEn: to continue or move forward
words.example: Proceed only after the safety check.

words.definitionEn: a formal event or legal process
words.definitionTh: กระบวนพิจารณา
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “proceeding”.

words.definitionEn: money received from a sale or event
words.definitionTh: รายได้จากการขาย
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “proceeds”.

words.definitionEn: the handling or transformation of data or material
words.definitionTh: การประมวลผล
words.example: Reduce image-processing time.

words.definitionEn: the unit that performs computer operations
words.definitionTh: หน่วยประมวลผล
words.example: The processor analyzes each frame.

words.definitionEn: to announce officially
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “proclaim”.

words.definitionEn: producing useful results
words.definitionTh: มีประสิทธิผล
words.example: The trial produced a productive discussion.
